name: Pipedrive
description: A sales CRM platform for managing leads, deals, activities and sales pipelines, with a public REST API to integrate and automate workflows.

auth_methods.note: Official API docs enumerate API token (personal API key) and OAuth2 as supported authentication methods.

credential_access.note: Personal API token can be obtained from a user's Settings > Personal preferences > API without contacting support. Documentation shows how to retrieve the token from the account UI, indicating developers can self-serve credentials. Marketplace/app publication has review, but basic API access uses account token.

api_surface.note: Pipedrive provides a comprehensive REST API (v1) covering core product objects (deals, persons, organizations, activities, products, pipelines, etc.) as documented in the API reference root.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs exist and developers can obtain a personal API token from their account without human approval, so integrations can be built today. Publishing apps to the Marketplace requires app submission/review but that doesn't block initial development.

queries: Pipedrive API authentication api token oauth2 developers.pipedrive.com
